title: Fix Better Auth 403 errors - mission critical
description: Auth migration from Clerk to Better Auth is broken. 403 errors on nearly every endpoint. 6 root causes identified: AUTH_PROVIDER_MODE defaults to clerk, requireAdminContext is Clerk-only, role hardcoded to user, no RBAC roles on auto-provisioned entities, wrong default port, cookie forwarding gaps.
close_reason: All 6 root causes fixed: requireAdminContext supports Better Auth, role resolved from DB, default RBAC roles auto-assigned, auth-client port fixed, billing routes use provider-agnostic org resolution

title: Complete Fastify route parity by domain
description: Break glapi-085 into domain parity workstreams and port remaining Next routes to Fastify/OpenAPI: relationships/lists, GL/reporting, revenue ASC 606, billing/customer portal, magic inbox/admin, webhooks, warehouse pricing, item variants/lots/serials/components, and tRPC compatibility where needed.

title: Create ERP conformance test suites
description: Create conformance suites for NetSuite-like ERP behavior: chart of accounts, periods, journal posting/reversal, AR invoices/payments/credits, AP bills/payments/credits, ASC 606 schedules, inventory costing/availability, project WIP/retainage, consolidation, saved search semantics, custom field validation, and custom record APIs.

title: Add API idempotency and mutation safety standards
description: Implement standard idempotency behavior for external API mutations: Idempotency-Key support, replay semantics, conflict detection, TTLs, request hashing, error contracts, and tests. Apply to posting/payment/revenue/import/billing endpoints first.

title: Harden event-sourced financial write model
description: Define and enforce the financial write contract: every GL-impacting create/update/post/reverse/void path emits immutable domain events, writes outbox entries, supports idempotency keys, records audit metadata, and updates projections deterministically. Cover GL, AR, AP, revenue, inventory, project accounting, and banking.

title: Implement custom record types and records
description: Implement NetSuite-style custom records: admin-defined record types with fields, permissions, relationships to standard/custom records, numbering/name rules, lifecycle states, CRUD APIs, OpenAPI schemas, saved-search support, audit/events, and optional UI list/detail rendering.

title: Implement generalized custom field definitions
description: Create a platform-wide custom field framework for standard and custom records. Support field types, labels, internal IDs, required/default/read-only flags, validation rules, select/list references, multi-select, permissions, search/report visibility, UI placement hints, API exposure, and audit/event changes. Existing JSONB customFields should become typed/validated by definitions, not free-form only.

title: Implement generalized saved searches
description: Implement a NetSuite-style saved search subsystem: users can define, save, share, permission, and run searches over standard and custom records with filters, joins, columns, sort, grouping/summary, formulas where safe, export, pagination, and API execution. Reuse existing saved_views only where appropriate; do not limit this to dashboards.

title: Expose ontology registry through Fastify and OpenAPI
description: Add Fastify endpoints and OpenAPI schemas to list ontology record definitions, fields, relationships, supported operations, event types, and version metadata. Generate SDK clients and docs from the same source.

title: Define canonical ontology registry and naming standards
description: Create a versioned ontology registry for record types, transaction types, list types, relationships, lifecycle states, event names, and API names. Include naming conventions, stable IDs/slugs, schema ownership, deprecation rules, and docs that make the model easy to understand without NetSuite tribal knowledge.
close_reason: Completed canonical ontology registry, naming standards, documentation, and tests.

title: Epic: Complete API-first ontology platform
description: Build GLAPI into an open-source, API-first ERP ontology: every business object, transaction, event, search, custom field, custom record, and projection is defined by versioned metadata, exposed through Fastify/OpenAPI, and backed by conformance tests. Keep RDS/database infrastructure as a later infra track.

title: Provision AWS ECS staging and production infrastructure
description: Fill infra/aws-ecs environment tfvars with real VPC, subnet, ACM, and Secrets Manager ARNs; apply staging and production workspaces; configure DNS aliases for staging.glapi.net, staging-api.glapi.net, web.glapi.net, and api.glapi.net.
close_reason: Provisioned AWS ECS staging and production stacks, deployed web/Fastify API images, verified services stable, Route53 aliases, OpenAPI, health checks, and Terraform no-drift plans.

title: Cut web API proxy over to Fastify ECS endpoint
description: Update web runtime configuration and proxy behavior to target the Fastify ECS API in staging first, then production after parity. Validate all auth/session forwarding and customer portal paths.
close_reason: Completed web proxy/runtime cutover to Fastify API URL with Better Auth cookie forwarding and AWS ECS env/secrets wired to Better Auth.

title: Implement production bearer and Better Auth parity in Fastify API
description: Replace the initial Fastify API key/header auth shim with full Clerk bearer verification and Better Auth session handling equivalent to apps/api/app/api/utils/auth.ts, without depending on next/headers.
close_reason: Completed Better Auth session handling in Fastify, added /api/auth/* forwarding, removed trusted Clerk/header auth from web proxy, and kept x-api-key for machine clients.

title: Port legacy Next REST API routes to Fastify
description: Move the remaining apps/api/app/api/** route handlers into apps/api-fastify with contract-backed request/response schemas. Keep Next API running until parity tests pass for billing, customer portal, GL/revenue, relationships/lists, magic inbox, and webhooks.

title: Migrate web and API deployment to AWS ECS with Fastify API
description: Move GLAPI off Vercel-hosted Next API/web runtime toward AWS ECS: Fastify API server, ECS/Fargate deployment targets for staging and production, API-first OpenAPI documentation, and CI/CD modeled after ../sureshake.
notes: Completed Better Auth migration slice: Fastify now serves Better Auth at /api/auth/*, resolves Better Auth sessions for protected tRPC, web runtime no longer uses Clerk provider/middleware, OpenAPI documents BetterAuthSession + ApiKeyAuth, and ECS secrets use BETTER_AUTH_SECRET/BETTER_AUTH_URL. Remaining blockers are REST route parity (glapi-085) and actual AWS provisioning/cutover (glapi-7vl).

comments.author: Fred Pope
comments.text: Implemented first migration slice: added apps/api-fastify with Fastify/tRPC/OpenAPI docs, Next standalone web Docker target, shared ECS Terraform target, AWS deploy/regression/promotion workflows, OpenAPI server URL updates, and runtime validation. Remaining work filed as glapi-085, glapi-cxf, glapi-7vl, and glapi-lqh.

title: TDD auth test suite - Karate + Playwright
description: Create comprehensive TDD test suite using Karate for API auth testing and Playwright for E2E auth testing. Tests should be CI-deployable to prevent auth regressions.
close_reason: TDD test suite created: 6 Karate feature files, 2 Playwright spec files, test provisioning script, CI workflow with auth-migration-tests job

title: Add Better Auth reconciliation script and fail-closed auth mapping checks
Roll out Better Auth schema to runtime databases
Document API-first ontology and extension model
description: Write canonical docs for developers and implementers: ontology concepts, standard record types, custom records, custom fields, saved searches, event model, permission model, API conventions, SDK usage, migration/versioning, and examples for common ERP extensions.

title: Make saved searches power lists, reports, exports, and APIs
description: Wire saved searches into list views, reporting, CSV export, scheduled delivery hooks, and API endpoints. Users should be able to save a search once and use it as a UI view, API query, report source, and automation trigger where permissions allow.

title: Add custom field and custom record UI builder
description: Build admin UI for creating custom fields and custom record types, including field layout, validation, permissions, search visibility, list/record references, and preview of generated API/search behavior. Avoid hardcoding to tasks; this must work across ontology record types.

title: Remove legacy Clerk-only code paths after AWS Fastify cutover
description: Clean up remaining legacy Clerk naming and integrations outside the migrated web/Fastify runtime: old Next API Clerk webhooks/utilities, MCP server Clerk auth headers, shared-types Clerk-branded aliases, and historical docs. Do this after ECS production cutover so compatibility fields can be removed safely.

title: Investigate account list 401 for selected organization
description: The accounts list returns 401 for at least one selected organization while working for another. The UI now surfaces the authorization error instead of showing an empty account list, but the underlying production org membership/auth context mapping for the affected company needs investigation.

title: Clean up existing duplicate chart accounts
description: Some organizations already have duplicated default chart-of-account rows. This fix makes future seeding idempotent, but existing duplicate account numbers should be deduplicated and the production database unique constraint on organization_id/account_number should be verified.

title: Persist vendor bill uploads and run OCR/Bedrock extraction
Add vendor bill intake and approval rules
close_reason: Completed vendor bill intake UI, email extraction payloads, and trusted vendor approval rules

title: Replace Clerk org switching and webhook dependencies with Better Auth
Configure Better Auth base URL for local app callbacks
close_reason: Configured shared Better Auth baseURL/trustedOrigins defaults for local API callbacks and AWS runtime env.

title: Defer RDS/Postgres infra until platform API model stabilizes
description: Later infra track: provision dedicated staging/prod RDS Postgres with Terraform, backups, monitoring, parameter groups, migrations, connection pooling, secrets rotation, and cutover runbooks after the API ontology, Fastify parity, saved searches, custom fields, custom records, and event write model are settled.

title: Slim Fastify API ECS Docker image
description: The Fastify API Docker image currently copies the workspace node_modules tree into the runtime image, making local bootstrap pushes slow. Replace this with a pruned production dependency/runtime artifact while preserving Better Auth, OpenAPI serving, and package imports.

title: Remove unsupported Next 16 eslint config from web
description: Next 16 warns during production builds that the eslint key in apps/web/next.config.ts is no longer supported. Remove or replace that config path so production Docker builds are warning-clean.
